zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hayward於1285年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓時，她的父親William Howard26歲，母親Joan de Huntingfield16歲。她於1321年與Sir John de Pêche II在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hayward于1285年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓时，她的父亲William Howard26岁，母亲Joan de Huntingfield16岁。她于1321年与Sir John de Pêche II在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1326年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hayward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Hayworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Howard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Heyworth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Hayward  ,   Haywood  , or   Haworth  .

variants.name: Haywood
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Haywood (Nottinghamshire, Staffordshire, Shropshire, Herefordshire) or Heywood (Lancashire, Wiltshire), or any of many other minor places so named, from Old English (ge)hæg ‘fence, enclosure’ + wudu ‘wood’. It was a common practice in the Middle Ages for areas of woodland to be fenced off as hunting grounds for the nobility. This name may have been confused in some cases with Hayward .
Altered form of English   Hogwood   and of its altered forms   Hagood   and   Haygood  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hayward was born in 1285, in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Howard, was 26 and her mother, Joan de Huntingfield, was 16. She married Sir John de Pêche II in 1321, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1326, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hayward(이)가 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 워레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Howard(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Huntingfield(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir John de Pêche II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Hampton-In-Arden, Warwickshire, England: хамптон ин арден, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hayward родилась в 1285 г. в местности вормлиитон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Howard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Huntingfield, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Pêche II в 1321 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.Hampton-In-Arden, Warwickshire, England: Hampton in Arden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Hayward nació en 1285, en Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Howard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Huntingfield, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir John de Pêche II en 1321, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1326, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
